messages.message: 'verifying' is assigned a value but never used.

React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'isSignedIn'. Either include it or remove the dependency array. Outer scope values like 'session' aren't valid dependencies because mutating them doesn't re-render the component.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [router, isSignedIn]

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'backdropOpacity' and 'panelX'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [backdropOpacity, panelX, visible]

messages.message: Do not use findDOMNode. It doesn’t work with function components and is deprecated in StrictMode. See https://reactjs.org/docs/react-dom.html#finddomnode
